s-1.ptxt: INSPECT INTAKE AIR CONTROL VALVE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Inspection procedure when using the intelligent tester:

s3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Select the following menu items: DIAGNOSIS / ENHANCED OBD II / ACTIVE TEST / INTAKE CTL VSV1. Press the right or left button.
Make sure that a clicking sound is heard from the intake air control valve when current flows.
If the result is not as specified, replace the intake air surge tank.
